Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 04 2002 at 10:25 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Does anyone have any useful info on what this has dropped of of?
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 15 2001 at 9:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i won the roll on this on my 23 druid, all the enchanters were mad because they are like ENCHANTER LEWT! im like no roll bishes so i won with a 2 of 100 cause i hacked them and make them all roll 0 aahah was funny but then i think this item is having a bug because when i put it in my head slot it says it wont equip on my class or lvl or something so im going to threaten some verant employee live till it fixed k so thx
Looks

It has the same plate pattern look of the bracer of hammerfal, but with a deep red tint

#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 9:20 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Simple solution to all the monk whining that occurs on this site: nerf the whole class out of existance. =P
#Anonymous, Posted: May 21 2001 at 8:56 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) why do they let the plate wearing classes use this when it should go to a monk

I cant believe they let fooking idiots like you post here.

#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 1:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Are you a complete moron, or just a partial one?
#REDACTED, Posted: May 22 2001 at 2:11 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Complete. Definitely complete.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 12:51 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What the hell are you talking about? It IS monk only. :P
#Anonymous, Posted: May 21 2001 at 8:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i think you monks have finally out whined the druis now , congratulations.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 21 2001 at 7:22 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) before weapons monk puched FOR 90 quad hittign witgh the lowest delay fist kick any monk only weapons ***!
RE: fist vs weapons
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2001 at 12:13 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
actually.. with my epic I tend to hit in the 40-60 range at the MOST, I've only ever hit near/over 90 while using innerflame.. a discipline that lasts 12 seconds and has a 30 min cycle time..
what is a weapon whine from a warrior doing on a monk only bracer post anyways?

58th monk
56th warrior
▲ Page top
RE: fist vs weapons
QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 5:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755816600
11 posts
Because Warriors got better weapons, and monks were doing less damage as warriors.
Look at it like this:
warrior: 3k hp, 1100 AC, damage output of 100%
monk: 1600hp, 950AC, damage output of 100%..

what is the difference? Feign death...

So they had to up monk weapons so at least monks would do 115% damage compared to warriors. Afterall, monks are there to do damage.
I must say, Indeed, warriors are the masters of weapons. That is why monks can only use blunt weapons and fists. Warriors can use any type of weapon thinkable

Monks pay heavily for the extra bit of damageoutput. And it's hard to make it when you don't have a Tranquil staff, since a monk dualwielding knuckle dusters does about the same damage as a warrior dualwielding lammy's. Tis the main reason monk's epic has a haste and ATK bonus, and not procs...

Last note... I'm getting pretty sick of all the monk whining. I mean, every light piece of equipment with some ac and stats that gets posted has the whine-topic going!

Ciao
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 5:30 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yeah, every wt < 1.0 decent item is "great for monks"...
#Anonymous, Posted: May 21 2001 at 7:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) are you stupid? 14ac 75hp 5sv all weightless bracer and you say its crap? what are you smoking my friend
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 24 2001 at 2:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) only the finest of w33d brotha =)
#Anonymous, Posted: May 21 2001 at 6:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Monks get screwed again... Why no str or agi? This is crap
#Anonymous, Posted: May 30 2001 at 1:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ROFL, you're a moron... give up on the monk now, if you think dex or agi matter you're playing the wrong class.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 1:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This might help you understand...
Agi is useful
QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 8:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749905435
Scholar
104 posts
Wrong. Completely Wrong. Agi does effect the chances of you defensive skills procing like Dodge and Block. Don't know about Riposte That would either be Agi or Dex, probably dex since it has offensive tendancies
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 4:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Sorry, Altizar, you're the one that is completely wrong. Agi has NO effect on the chance of a defensive skill proc. Go back about a year to when Gordon explained what Dex and Agi do, and I think you'll be just as dissappointed as all those rogues that had insanely high dex and agi stats were. Agi will increase your AC, marginally. I believe that both Agi and Dex are used in calculating the chance of getting a skill raise, but that's it for defensive skills.
RE: Agi is useful
QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 3:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750926490
95 posts
Agi helps dodge, dex doesn't help anything but procs. It does so little though that just pure AC is better to have really, since skill points matter more then stats.
▲ Page top
RE: Agi is useful
QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 9:53 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248899171
75 posts
WRONG! COMPLETELY WRONG! Skill procs are determined by the score in the skill and no attribute has anything to do with it.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 21 2001 at 5:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) We need to see more Monk only items, this is a step in the right direction!!! Now only if the weapons would follow...
#Anonymous, Posted: May 21 2001 at 6:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yeah, then maybe they would stop posting on every other All/All item from ToV. Give them there own crap so they stop whining on the other boards!
